name: Salesforce Essentials
shortDescription: Essential CRM integration platform for Salesforce automation focused on core contact, lead, and campaign management workflows.

actions.name: Add Contact to Campaign
actions.description: Adds an existing contact to an existing campaign.

actions.name: Add Lead to Campaign
actions.description: Adds an existing lead to an existing campaign.

actions.name: Create Record
actions.description: Creates a new record of a specified Salesforce object (e.g., Contact, Lead, Opportunity).

actions.name: Update Record
actions.description: Updates an existing record for a specified Salesforce object.

actions.name: Find Record
actions.description: Finds a record of a specified Salesforce object by a field and value you choose. Optionally, creates a record if none is found.

actions.name: Find Record by Query
actions.description: Finds a record of a Salesforce object using a Salesforce Object Query (SOQL) WHERE clause.

idealUseCases: Basic CRM record creation and updates
